raw_input.title: Senior AI Engineer
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Senior AI Engineer marketplace role for startups in the US and Europe. Projects in fast-paced startup environments. Senior AI engineering, often requiring production AI/ML depth and sometimes Rust or specialized model/system skills.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with practical AI interest/use, but not a Senior AI Engineer profile and no Rust stack.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: interesting adjacent AI role, but APPLY_NOW 82 overstates the fit.
